items.source_title: Migration hypothesis for Harmony -> Data Integration

limitations: Does not model raw counts; correction ceiling is locked by the quality of the input PCA or embedding matrix.
Embedding-level soft-cluster correction is acceptable for rapid alignment prototypes only; it cannot restore or generate raw counts and must be blocked for generative count-modeling requests.
migration_paths.transferable_mechanism: Embedding-level correction can transfer to fast integration scenarios with precomputed representations.
compatibility_gaps: requires precomputed high-quality embedding
cannot infer raw count corrections
alignment must be validated against biology preservation

migration_context.description: Accepted exploratory MigrationHypothesis items only. They are innovation routes, not formal recommendations.

paths.transferable_mechanism: Anchor and WNN ideas can transfer to cross-modal or multi-view matching hypotheses.
compatibility_gaps: version-specific workflow
claims must specify anchor/WNN scope
not a single fixed algorithmic guarantee
limitations: Version and workflow specific; claims must specify Seurat version and task, and cannot be treated as a single fixed algorithm.
Accept only when the transferable mechanism is explicitly CCA/RPCA/WNN anchor matching; block generic claims that Seurat itself is broadly superior.
paths.claim_boundary: Exploratory MigrationHypothesis only; not a formal recommendation and not benchmark-backed performance evidence.

paths.transferable_mechanism: Embedding-level correction can transfer to fast integration scenarios with precomputed representations.
compatibility_gaps: requires precomputed high-quality embedding
cannot infer raw count corrections
alignment must be validated against biology preservation
limitations: Does not model raw counts; correction ceiling is locked by the quality of the input PCA or embedding matrix.
Embedding-level soft-cluster correction is acceptable for rapid alignment prototypes only; it cannot restore or generate raw counts and must be blocked for generative count-modeling requests.
paths.claim_boundary: Exploratory MigrationHypothesis only; not a formal recommendation and not benchmark-backed performance evidence.
